title: Azure Support Engineer
description: Support Azure environments, troubleshoot identity, networking, and VM issues.

title: AWS Cloud Support Associate
description: Assist with AWS services including IAM, EC2, S3, VPC, and monitoring.

title: Network Operations Engineer
description: Monitor connectivity, routing, switching, DNS, DHCP, and VPN services.

title: IAM Administrator
description: Manage identity platforms, MFA, conditional access, and role-based access controls.

title: Cloud Security Analyst
description: Investigate security events, review access policies, and harden cloud environments.

title: Windows Systems Administrator
description: Support Windows endpoints, patching, Group Policy, and Active Directory operations.
